description: declarative CertificateAdmit contract compiled to SQL and linearizable KV checks

predicates.if_omitted: crash after receive can lose malformed or deterministic rejection provenance
predicates.postgres: INSERT INTO AttemptInbox(attempt_id, receive_hash, state, received_at) VALUES ($1, $2, 'received', $3) ON CONFLICT (attempt_id) DO NOTHING
predicates.sqlite: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO AttemptInbox(attempt_id, receive_hash, state, received_at) VALUES (:attempt_id, :receive_hash, 'received', :now)

predicates.postgres: UPDATE SourceToken SET state='consumed' WHERE src=$1 AND state='issued'; -- rowcount must be 1
predicates.sqlite: UPDATE SourceToken SET state='consumed' WHERE src=:src AND state='issued'; -- rowcount must be 1

predicates.kv: compare absent terminal/rid/nonce, counter/seller/session/ctr, and nonce/seller/session/nonce
predicates.postgres: same unique indexes, enforced inside SERIALIZABLE transaction
predicates.sqlite: PRIMARY KEY(rid, nonce); UNIQUE(seller, session, ctr); UNIQUE(seller, session, nonce)

predicates.kv: read immutable policy/price key selected by attested policy
predicates.postgres: SELECT ... FOR SHARE FROM PricePolicy WHERE policy=$1 AND price_id=$2
predicates.sqlite: SELECT 1 FROM PricePolicy WHERE policy=:policy AND price_id=:price_id

predicates.kv: put reject/K_t/reason for parsed failures or reject/K_a/reason for malformed receives
predicates.postgres: INSERT INTO RejectLog(reject_key, rid, nonce, reason, seller, workload) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6) ON CONFLICT (reject_key) DO NOTHING
predicates.sqlite: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO RejectLog(reject_key, rid, nonce, reason, seller, workload) VALUES (:reject_key, :rid, :nonce, :reason, :seller, :workload)

predicates.kv: put queue/rid/nonce in the success branch of the same compare-put transaction
predicates.postgres: same queue insert in the accept branch of one SERIALIZABLE transaction
predicates.sqlite: INSERT INTO AggregateQueue(rid, nonce, ...) only after source, freshness, price, commitment, and residual checks

predicates.kv: include residual bucket in attested success value
predicates.postgres: same residual evidence predicate in transaction
predicates.sqlite: CHECK residual evidence before accepted CertLedger status

relations.name: AttemptInbox
relations.role: durable receive record before parsing, verification, or rejection
relations.schema: attempt_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, receive_hash TEXT NOT NULL, state TEXT NOT NULL, received_at REAL NOT NULL

relations.name: SourceToken
relations.role: one issued source/cohort slot consumed at most once
relations.schema: src TEXT PRIMARY KEY, seller TEXT NOT NULL, session TEXT NOT NULL, workload TEXT NOT NULL, state TEXT NOT NULL

relations.name: CertLedger
relations.schema: rid TEXT NOT NULL, nonce TEXT NOT NULL, src TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, seller TEXT NOT NULL, session TEXT NOT NULL, ctr INTEGER NOT NULL, policy TEXT NOT NULL, price_id TEXT NOT NULL, commitment TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(rid, nonce), UNIQUE(seller, session, ctr), UNIQUE(seller, session, nonce)

relations.name: PricePolicy
relations.role: posted price/SLA row bound before admission
relations.schema: policy TEXT NOT NULL, price_id TEXT NOT NULL, quality_class TEXT NOT NULL, price REAL NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(policy, price_id)

relations.name: RejectLog
relations.role: queryable deterministic rejection provenance keyed by terminal key or receive id
relations.schema: reject_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, rid TEXT, nonce TEXT, reason TEXT NOT NULL, seller TEXT NOT NULL, workload TEXT NOT NULL

relations.name: AggregateQueue
relations.schema: rid TEXT NOT NULL, nonce TEXT NOT NULL, src TEXT NOT NULL, seller TEXT NOT NULL, session TEXT NOT NULL, workload TEXT NOT NULL, quality_class TEXT NOT NULL, price_id TEXT NOT NULL, commitment TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(rid, nonce)
